nasb.text: They raise their voices, they shout for joy; They cry out from the west concerning the majesty of the Lord.

esv.text: They lift up their voices, they sing for joy; over the majesty of the Lord they shout from the west.

cnv.text: 剩餘的人必高聲歡呼， 在西邊的，要宣揚耶和華的威嚴。

ccb.text: 劫后余生的人必高声欢呼， 在西方赞美耶和华的威严。

csbs.text: 他们必扬声欢唱， 从西边颂扬耶和华的威严；
